name: PACCAR
analysis: PCAR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $120.8700, stop $105.7023, target $166.3731 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
